canonical_definition: A benchmark for evaluating multilingual cross-modal ambiguity resolution, consisting of 1278 samples in Chinese, English, and Malay, including dual-ambiguity cases where both text and image are ambiguous but jointly resolve to a single interpretation.
papers: Vision-and-Language Navigation with Analogical Textual Descriptions inLLMs

definitions.text: A benchmark for evaluating multilingual cross-modal ambiguity resolution, consisting of 1278 samples in Chinese, English, and Malay, including dual-ambiguity cases where both text and image are ambiguous but jointly resolve to a single interpretation.
definitions.paper: Vision-and-Language Navigation with Analogical Textual Descriptions inLLMs
